refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the spatial reference identifier for a geometry.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns the spatial reference identifier for the ST_Geometry as defined in spatial_ref_sys table.

note.para: spatial_ref_sys table is a table that catalogs all spatial reference systems known to PostGIS and is used for transformations from one spatial reference system to another. So verifying you have the right spatial reference system identifier is important if you plan to ever transform your geometries.
